'''Cranan 12''', or simply '''Cranan''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
Cranan 12 was a thriving planet, rich in [[Ore/Legends|ores]] and [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]]. It was the only world controlled and exploited by the [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] in the Arkanis sector. Most shipments from Cranan were sent to [[Excarga/Legends|Excarga]], by the [[Cranan-Excarga Route]], a situation the sector authorities on [[Arkanis/Legends|Arkanis]] have tried to reverse through a combination of inducements and threats.<ref name="Atlas" />
